reference: It may not be that serious a problem and may be managed with physical therapy and the addition of methylcobalamin, vitamin D, vitamin E, and vitamins B1, B6, and B12. It can improve with this treatment, but it does take time. Please see a neurologist for evaluation. Best wishes.
text: It may not be that serious a problem and may be managed with physical therapy and the addition of methylcobalamin, vitamin D, vitamin E, and vitamins B1, B6, and B12. It can improve with this treatment, but it does take time. Please see a neurologist for evaluation. Best wishes.
